name: Pork Kabobs with Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons red wine vinegar or cider vinegar
2 tablespoons finely chopped pickled hot chiles
recipeInstructions:
Prepare Chile Barbecue Sauce. Trim fat from pork tenderloin. Cut pork into 1-1/2-inch cubes. Mix pork and 1-1/4 cups of the sauce in a large glass or plastic bowl. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours but no longer than 24 hours. Refrigerate remaining sauce separately. Set oven control to broil. Thread pork onto six 10-inch skewers. Brush each skewer with nonstick cooking spray if using bamboo skewers (soak in water for at least 30 minutes before use). Place pork on the broiler pan rack, tops 3 inches from heat. Broil for 5 minutes; turn. Brush with 1/4 cup of sauce. Continue broiling about 5 more minutes or until pork is no longer pink. Serve with remaining sauce over steamed cabbage if desired. Makes 6 servings.
Converted by MCBuster.
